title: MP Evas Cranes Plus bonus observation
display_title: MP Evas Cranes Plus bonus observation
wikitext:
[]: MP Evas = Cranes? (Plus bonus observation!)             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Sun Apr 22, 2007 5:19 pm So the other day I'm learning about cranes. Apparently they play a large role in Japanese folklore and are frequently referenced in their literature and artwork. [URL=http://server6.theimagehosting.com/image.php?img=800px-Cranes_japan.jpg] [/URL] Anyways, don't they look like the mass production evas? They both have the same color scheme and have similar wing spans. [URL=http://server6.theimagehosting.com/image.php?img=Eva-05.jpg] [/URL] Also, has anyone ever noticed the similarity between Fuyutski's clothing and that of the Zentraedi in Macross? [URL=http://server6.theimagehosting.com/image.php?img=fuyutsuki01.gif] [/URL] They both seem to have the same brown suit + triangle emblem on their chest. [URL=http://server6.theimagehosting.com/image.php?img=300px-Khyron_the_Backstabber_from_Robotech_Macross.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Apr 22, 2007 6:49 pm i dont see any connection in the clothing. although the way he leans over is kind of interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Apr 22, 2007 7:40 pm The Ryousanki have always reminded me more of vultures than cranes.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun Apr 22, 2007 8:54 pm The Topic smells of lock. I dont really feel sorry.

Article: MP Evas Cranes Plus bonus observation
[]: MP Evas = Cranes? (Plus bonus observation!)             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Sun Apr 22, 2007 5:19 pm So the other day I'm learning about cranes. Apparently they play a large role in Japanese folklore and are frequently referenced in their literature and artwork. [URL=http://server6.theimagehosting.com/image.php?img=800px-Cranes_japan.jpg] [/URL] Anyways, don't they look like the mass production evas? They both have the same color scheme and have similar wing spans. [URL=http://server6.theimagehosting.com/image.php?img=Eva-05.jpg] [/URL] Also, has anyone ever noticed the similarity between Fuyutski's clothing and that of the Zentraedi in Macross? [URL=http://server6.theimagehosting.com/image.php?img=fuyutsuki01.gif] [/URL] They both seem to have the same brown suit + triangle emblem on their chest. [URL=http://server6.theimagehosting.com/image.php?img=300px-Khyron_the_Backstabber_from_Robotech_Macross.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Apr 22, 2007 6:49 pm i dont see any connection in the clothing. although the way he leans over is kind of interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Apr 22, 2007 7:40 pm The Ryousanki have always reminded me more of vultures than cranes.
